evals.description: Report a bug from text description
evals.prompt: /iikit-bugfix Login fails when email contains plus sign

assertions: Prompts for severity and reproduction steps
Generates fix tasks in tasks.md with T-B prefix

evals.description: Import bug from GitHub issue number

assertions: Fetches issue via gh issue view
Maps title to description, body to repro steps
Does NOT create outbound GitHub issue

evals.description: Critical P0 bug with expedited flow
evals.prompt: Report a critical production bug: payment processing is down

evals.description: Should NOT activate for feature requests
evals.prompt: Add a new payment method to the checkout flow

expected.reason: User wants a new feature, not a bug fix — should route to iikit-01-specify

evals.description: Should NOT activate for test generation
evals.prompt: Generate test cases for the login feature

expected.reason: User wants iikit-04-testify for test generation, not bugfix

evals.description: No features exist to report bug against
evals.setup: Empty project with no specs/ features

assertions: Shows both text and #number usage patterns
